_comment: Source of truth for pe-meta-review orchestrator and pe-meta-researcher agent. Catalogs monitored external/internal sources, per-source state location, default lookback window, and sampling parameters used by --dim adherence.
_version_scheme_comment: Each monitored source declares a version_scheme describing its version-identifier shape: 'semver' (e.g. 1.107), 'dated' (ISO-8601 publish date), 'model-version' (vendor model-version string), or 'none' (no stable version token). Dual role: the source ledger uses it to record last_seen_version, and the pe-meta-review Phase 0a parser uses it to recognize and resolve a version-shaped --start/--end token to a timestamp. A source with version_scheme 'none' rejects a version-shaped window bound ('use a date window').

platform.description: Visual Studio Code release notes — capability changes affecting agent/tool surfaces and customization files.
GitHub Copilot changelog — chat, agent mode, customization files, MCP.

state._comment: Root for per-source trigger state files at <state.path>/triggers/<source-id>.json and Phase 6 outcome logs at <state.path>/outcomes/<run-id>.jsonl.

lookback._comment: Default window when caller passes --start without explicit value resolution; researcher uses this as the bounded-delta window when not otherwise specified.

sampling._comment: Number of consumers sampled per guidance file when --dim adherence runs with derived breadth=full. Stratified by artifact-type and layer per pe-meta-adherence sampling rules.
